description: Create a polygon in the current geometry set. If the set keyword is given then the edge is created in that set. A list of edges, a list of nodes or a list of points in space can be input. If an edge list is used, the edges must be given in order and form a closed polygon. If a node list is used, edges are created if none are found, and the polygon is automatically closed. If a position list is used, nodes and edges are created if none are found, and the polygon is automatically closed. A warning results if the polygon is not planar or is not convex. If an extrude vector is provided, then the polygon will be extruded along that vector, resulting in a closed volume of polygonal surfaces.

keywords.name: by-edges
keywords.description: List of edge IDs that belong to the polygon. The IDs must be ordered such that the edges form a closed polygon.

keywords.name: by-nodes
keywords.description: List of node IDs that belong to the polygon. Edges are created if none are found, and the polygon is automatically closed.

keywords.name: by-positions
keywords.description: List of nodal positions that belong to the polygon. Nodes and edges are created if none are found, and the polygon is automatically closed.

keywords.name: extrude
keywords.description: will create polygon and “extrude” in the direction supplied.

keywords.name: extra
keywords.description: Optionally assign the extra variable a to index i .

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: Optionally assign the group name s1 to slot s2 (optional).
